five-out.title: 5-out spacing
five-out.summary: Keep corners filled, lift on drives, punish help with drive-kick threes.

screen-actions.title: Screen actions
screen-actions.summary: Track screen assists, screen opportunities, and advantage-created possessions.
screen-actions.notes: Connect this later to screen stats from the tracker.

transition-defense.title: Transition defense
transition-defense.summary: First three steps back after shots and turnovers. Stop ball early.
